files.purpose: Synthesis-native composition interface with deterministic bounded provider. Defines composition contract for governed narrative, derives narrative anchors from hero moments, composes 5-position editorial arc (OPENING, REVELATION, DEPTH, AUTHORITY, QUALIFICATION).

Integrated GoverningNarrativeComposer. Added governed_narrative field to fullReport output. S1 SVG policy gating (svg_policy capped to REGISTRY at S1). S1 evidence_blocks suppression (triadic roles meaningless without semantic topology).
Added spine_objects path to optional artifacts for hero moment and evidence object loading.

Added NarrativeEnvelope (selectable sections with arc chips), BoardroomStructuralPosture fallback. Three-panel cognitive layout: CENTER narrative sections with click-to-inspect, LEFT evidence context panel (anchors, source artifacts, authority envelope per selected section), RIGHT operational continuation (qualification, structural substrate, composition provenance, selected section context). BoardroomDecisionSurface branches on S1 (narrative-first) vs S2+ (existing cockpit preserved). S1 SVG, triadic roles, pressure flow suppressed. selectedNarrativeArc state propagated through IntelligenceField → RepresentationField → BoardroomDecisionSurface → NarrativeEnvelope + ExecutiveInterpretation + SupportRail.

Added narrative envelope CSS: selectable paragraph styling (border-left accent, hover/selected states), arc claim chips (PROFILE/DISCOVERY/COUPLING/AUTHORITY/GATE colors), anchor count display. LEFT panel evidence anchor display styles. RIGHT panel S1 blocks (qualification state, KV lists, maturity indicator, arc context). Fixed density/boardroom mode toggle mutual exclusion (clicking density radio now clears boardroomMode).
